hero.title: One-Stop Office Furniture Solutions
hero.description: Saudi Leading manufacturer of office furniture. Transform your workplace with our premium furniture collection.
factory.title: 42,000sqm Manufacturing Base in Saudi
factory.description: Include melamine manufacturing base, sofa manufacturing base, and over 25,000 ready stock chairs. Damons leverages advanced technology and expert craftsmanship to craft premium office furniture. Our hands-on, controlled production process ensures precision engineering, consistent quality, and durable, long-lasting workspace solutions.
cases.title: Project Cases
cases.description: Explore our successful project cases and see how we deliver exceptional office furniture solutions.
trust.title: Our Clients
cert.title: Saudi Made, Global Standards
cert.description: We combine premium design with world-class quality. Local Content, BIFMA, ISO, and FSC certifications, every piece meets the highest standards for performance, safety, and sustainability.
services.title: Damons Services
service1.title: Space Planning & Design
service1.description: We offer free space design and on-site measurement, delivering tailored, professional office space solutions to fit your unique needs.
service2.title: Fast Delivery & Customization
service2.description: Our local factory supports full customization to your requirements, backed by large inventory for same-day delivery, plus a 5-year warranty for peace of mind.
service3.title: Professional Installation
service3.description: Our expert installation team provides seamless, one-stop service from start to finish, ensuring a hassle-free experience.
products.title: Product Categories
aboutUs.title: About us
aboutUs.description: Damons is a leading, Saudi local manufacturer, designer and supplier of modern office furniture. Committed to provide workplace furniture that delivers great value by combining modern design, dependable quality and exceptional service.

cookie.banner.text: We use necessary cookies and collect page view data and contact form information to improve your experience. By continuing to browse, you agree to our data practices as described in the
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At DAMONS, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the Saudi Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or submit inquiries through our contact form.
privacy.collection.title: Information We Collect
privacy.collection.text:
We collect the following types of information:

• Contact Information: When you fill out our contact form, we collect your name, company name, phone number, email address, and message.
• Usage Data: We automatically collect page view data and interaction information to understand how visitors use our website.
• Technical Data: We may collect your IP address, browser type, and device information for security and analytics purposes.
privacy.usage.title: How We Use Your Information
privacy.usage.text:
We use your personal data for the following purposes:

• To respond to your inquiries and provide customer support.
• To improve our website, products, and services.
• To analyze website traffic and user behavior.
• To comply with legal obligations and protect our rights.
privacy.sharing.title: Information Sharing and Disclosure
privacy.sharing.text:
We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:

• With service providers who assist us in operating our website and business, under strict confidentiality agreements.
• When required by law or to protect our legal rights.
• In connection with a business transfer, such as a merger or acquisition.
privacy.security.title: Data Security
privacy.security.text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.rights.title: Your Rights
privacy.rights.text:
Under the Saudi PDPL, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

• The right to access and obtain a copy of your personal data.
• The right to request correction or updating of inaccurate data.
• The right to request destruction of your personal data, subject to legal retention requirements.
• The right to withdraw consent for data processing where consent is the legal basis.
privacy.contact.title: Contact Us
privacy.contact.text: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:
